title: Normal Modpack - Cursed? Don't think so....
description: Totally normal minecraft gameplay experience, nothing weird at all, no, no
body:
This Modpack adds a variety of very _necassery_ features like eating everything and fixing minecraft by various means...

This pack has a collections of "cursed" mods (and dome others), like eating everything, flying foxes or the ability to bucket (almost) all mobs. None of the mods should empose too great of a change (balance be ignored) to the vanilla gameplay mechanics through adding mostly a few fun new things to discover and nothing that would make the game unenjoyable or even borderline unplayable, despite providing a somewhat ... unique experience if one wants to try to spice up their game a little without altering any major parts of the game drastically.
